author: Joel Ponukumatla
name: 11L Tight SWA + Shared VE + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + XSA4 + Late QAT
blurb: Full competitive stack: Tight SWA (scale<0.2, every 50), Shared Value Embedding on layers 9-10, Partial RoPE (16/64 dims), depth-dependent LN scaling, XSA on last 4 layers, Late QAT at scale<0.1. FA3 on 8xH100 SXM.
